description: Recent CS graduate with one internship and IT help desk experience, two class projects, no quantified achievements
resumeText:
Alex Martinez
alex.martinez@gmail.com | (512) 555-0847 | Austin, TX

OBJECTIVE
I am a recent computer science graduate looking for a software engineering position where I can use my programming skills and grow as a developer. I am a fast learner and a hard worker.

EDUCATION
Bachelor of Science, Computer Science — University of Texas at Austin
Graduated May 2024 | GPA: 3.4
Relevant Coursework: Data Structures, Algorithms, Operating Systems, Database Systems, Web Development

EXPERIENCE

Software Engineering Intern — TechStart Inc., Austin, TX
June 2023 – August 2023
- Helped the backend team with Node.js and Express development
- Fixed some bugs in the REST API
- Attended daily standups and sprint planning meetings
- Wrote documentation for a few API endpoints
- Used Git for version control

IT Help Desk Technician — UT Austin IT Department, Austin, TX
September 2022 – May 2024
- Helped students and faculty with computer problems
- Reset passwords and set up accounts
- Troubleshot hardware and software issues
- Answered phone and email support tickets

PROJECTS

Task Manager App (Class Project)
- Built a task management web application for my web development class
- Used HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
- Allows users to add, edit, and delete tasks
- Submitted as final project and received an A

Weather Dashboard (Class Project)
- Created a weather dashboard using a public API
- Used JavaScript to fetch weather data and display it
- Shows current temperature and a 5-day forecast
- Deployed to GitHub Pages

SKILLS
Programming Languages: JavaScript, Python, Java, HTML, CSS
Tools: Git, GitHub, VS Code
Concepts: REST APIs, Object-Oriented Programming, Agile

ACTIVITIES
- Member of Association for Computing Machinery (ACM) student chapter
- Attended one hackathon in 2023
